rulings.Case Title: EMELIE B SANTANA VS. BANK OF AMERICA HOME LOANS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 18, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC., BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AND THE BANK OF NEW YORK'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with final leave to amend to allege facts showing tolling of statutes of limitation; to allege tender; to allege duty; to allege terms of contracts allegedly breached and standing; fraud with particularity differentiating between defendants. Sustain with leave to amend to allege standing regarding 4th cause of action for securities fraud and tolling of statute of limitations. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: ROXANA CASTRO, INDIVIDUALLY ANS ON BEHALF OF ALL VS. SANTOS BONILLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint To Include Alberto R. Castro As A Pltf;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 18, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF ROXANA CASTRO, INDIVIDUALLY ANS ON BEHALF OF ALL, ROXANA CASTRO AND ARTURO PAREDES' Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Complaint To Include Alberto R. Castro As A Plaintiff GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SOPHIE PAPPAS VS. JORDAN MALLIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 18, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT JORDAN MALLIN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT 1st and 3rd c/a for breach of contract and breach of covenant of good faith-OVERRULED, complaint sufficiently alleges breach of no-sublet provision; 2nd, 4th, 8th c/a for promissory estoppel, common counts, and unjust enrichment - is OVERRULED, all elements sufficiently plead, including a promise relied upon by Plaintiff in entering the contract for lower rent; 5th, 6th and 7th causes of action or fraud - OVERRULED, fraud is sufficiently alleged. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SOPHIE PAPPAS VS. JORDAN MALLIN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 18, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT JORDAN MALLIN'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENIED as to punitive damages and GRANTED as to request for attorney's fees. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASOCIATION VS. RANDALL B ALLISON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 18, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASOCIATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Plaintiff failed to sustain it's burden and failed to show that foreclosure sale was conducted in compliance with California Civil Code 2924, specifically 2924(a)(1)(C). = (501/AJR)
